title: astelia linearis var. linearis
intro: Astelia linearis var. linearis, also known as the Astelia or Wharawhara, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand. This plant has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Astelia linearis var. linearis include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and potentially lowering blood pressure. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
